case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. YOLANDA ESTHER CACH TZIU

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED AUG-27-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TZIU, YOLANDA ESTHER CACH

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY ANGEL GARCIA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YOLANDA ESTHER CACH TZIU IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANGEL GARCIA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,291.28 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TZIU, YOLANDA ESTHER CACH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TZIU, YOLANDA ESTHER CACH $2,291.28 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,391.28 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
